message:
fix(output): Update RichOutput for rich_rust API changes

- Update imports to use rich_rust::renderables module
- Replace unsafe impl Send/Sync with automatic trait derivation
- Fix Panel::new() -> Panel::from_text() for string content
- Fix Table::render_plain() to pass width argument
- Fix Tree::render_plain() to call without arguments
- Remove obsolete TableExt and TreeExt extension traits

Related: bd-3sk3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
